reference: I have been having swollen ankles. It is to the point where my ankles really hurt and it is hard to walk. I have been experiencing leg cramps where my second toe will bend down and get stuck. I have also had a feeling of burning in my calves and ankles. This is in both ankles. I am not sure where to start with trying to figure out what is wrong with me. What kind of doctor should I see and what kind of tests should I start with?
text: I have been having swollen ankles. It is to the point where my ankles really hurt and it is hard to walk. I have been experiencing leg cramps where my second toe will bend down and get stuck.
